examples: In other words, Voltaire's amateurism in science "was a source of his contemporary appeal, demonstrating for the first time the accessibility of Newton's ideas to nonspecialists".
Seminar topics are chosen for their accessibility to a general audience.
We study user patterns and know based on business type, etc. what layouts, content, accessibility work.
Most people think of wheelchair ramps and wide hallways as accessibility issues, and they are.
